entries.name: Arms & Hands
entries.description: Step One (Disproportion Table, WB5 p. 87): the disproportionate body area is the arms and hands. Roll on Disproportionate Arms & Hands (p. 88).

entries.name: Barrel-Chested and Stoutly Built
entries.description: The character’s overall body is stout with a thick, short waist and muscular, bar- rel-chested upper body like a bear or gorilla; +3D6 S.D.C., +2D6 to P.S., and +1 to P.E. Penalties: Reduce Spd by 5%, -1 to pull punch, -15% to Disguise and Undercover Ops skills, and wearing tight clothing is impossible, unless custom made, other- wise clothing must be loose or a bit oversized.

entries.name: Head
entries.description: Step One (Disproportion Table, WB5 p. 87): the disproportionate body area is the head. Roll on Disproportionate Head for the specific trait, bonuses, and penalties.

entries.name: Huge Ears
entries.description: 1D4 times larger than is common; +1D4 to Perception Rolls dealing with sound. Penalties: -2 to P.B. and -20% to Disguise and Undercover Ops skills.

entries.name: Huge Eyes
entries.description: Perfect vision, excellent peripheral vi- sion (can see 180 degrees) and Nightvision (1,000 feet/305 m; increase range an extra 1000 feet if the character already has Nightvision), and +1 to Perception Rolls involving vision in the dark and in dim lighting. Penalties: Light sensitive – sunlight and other bright lights hurt the eyes, cause the character to squint, reduce normal (daylight) vision by half, and -2 to Per- ception Rolls involving vision in well lit areas and daytime.

entries.name: Huge Feet
entries.description: +5% to Swimming skill and swimming speed, +2 kick and stomp damage, +10% to balance, and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalties: Reduce Speed by 10%, -5% to Prowl, and may need custom shoes.

entries.name: Huge Forearms
entries.description: The character has forearms like Popeye, +1D4 P.S., +1D6 to S.D.C, and +1 to parry. Penalties: Wearing tight clothing and long sleeves is impossible, unless very loose and oversized. Furthermore, the character has trouble fitting his arms through narrow openings and tight spaces.

entries.name: Huge Hands
entries.description: Hands are two or three times the size of normal. +1 to P.S., +1 to entangle and disarm, +2 to damage, +1D4 to S.D.C. and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalties: -1 to P.P., -1 to pull punch, -5% to delicate skills, and makes wearing tight clothing and long sleeves impossible, unless very loose and oversized. Furthermore, the character has trouble fitting his arms through narrow openings and tight spaces.

entries.name: Huge Jaw, Strong Neck
entries.description: +1D6 damage with bite attacks, can hold onto rope with teeth with the same strength and grip as his hands without injury to the neck, and +1 to Hor- ror Factor. Penalties: -1 to P.B. and -20% to Disguise and Un- dercover skills.

entries.name: Huge Legs
entries.description: Large, thick, muscular upper legs remi- niscent of a frog’s legs; +2 to P.S., +1D6+6 to Spd, can jump twice the usual distance and height for that character (12 feet/3.6 m minimum), +5% to Climbing skill, and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalties: -5% to Prowl and may need custom clothing.

entries.name: Huge Nose
entries.description: Keen sense of smell, can track by scent: 20% +4% per level of experience, and +2 to Perception Rolls dealing with scents and odors. Penalties: -2 to save vs gas attacks (including smoke, tear gas, stench, and other strong odors) and -3 to save vs nausea and vomiting resulting from foul odors and airborne toxins.

entries.name: Huge Teeth
entries.description: +1D6 damage to bite attacks, +1 to Horror Factor. Penalty: -1 to P.B.

entries.name: Huge, Broad, Shoulders
entries.description: +2 to P.S., +1D6+1 to S.D.C., and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalties: Makes wearing tight clothing and even normal sized clothing impossible (too tight); needs oversized shirts, jackets and coats.

entries.name: Large Head
entries.description: The entire head is twice as large as usual. +1D4 to I.Q. and +2 to M.E. attributes. Penalties: -1 to P.B. and P.E. attributes, and the character may seem more vul- nerable and unable to defend himself than he really is; -2 from Horror Factor.

entries.name: Large Mouth
entries.description: The mouth is unusually large and creepy, lips may be large and plump or thin; +2 to bite damage and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalty: -1 from P.B.

entries.name: Large, Muscular Upper Arms
entries.description: +1D4 to P.S., +1D6+2 to S.D.C., and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalties: Makes wearing tight clothing and even normal sized clothing impossi- ble (too tight); needs oversized shirts, jackets and coats or cus- tom-made clothing.

entries.name: Large, Thick Neck
entries.description: +1D6+2 S.D.C. and +1 Horror Factor.

entries.name: Legs & Feet
entries.description: Step One (Disproportion Table, WB5 p. 87): the disproportionate body area is the legs and feet. Roll on Disproportionate Legs & Feet (p. 88).

entries.name: Long, Thin Legs
entries.description: Increase length/height by 10%, straight legs like a board, +1 to dodge, +1 to kick damage, and +1D4 to Spd attribute. Penalties: -1 to P.E. attribute.

entries.name: Morbidly Obese
entries.description: Double the character’s weight; +4D6+6 S.D.C. and +1D4 to P.S. Penalty: Reduce Spd by 20% and -10% to Disguise and Undercover Ops skills.

entries.name: Muscular
entries.description: Chiseled and sculpted stomach, chest, and shoulder muscles; +3D6+6 S.D.C. +1D6 to P.S. Penalties: -1 on initiative and -1D4 from Spd.

entries.name: No chin
entries.description: The character’s chin is small, flat, and seems to practically fade into the neck. Penalties: -1 to P.B. and -1 from Horror Factor.

entries.name: Pencil Neck
entries.description: The neck seems unusually thin and long. The advantage is -1 to be hit by a Called Shot to the neck. Penalties: -1D6 S.D.C. and -1 from Horror Factor.

entries.name: Puny Build
entries.description: The upper body looks like the prover- bial 90 pound weakling or an emaciated concentration camp vic- tim; skin and bones; +10% to Escape Artist and Prowl skills, +2 to Horror Factor. Penalties: Reduce weight by 50%, -4D6 from S.D.C., and -1 from P.E. and P.B.

entries.name: Roll twice for two disproportions
entries.description: Step One (Disproportion Table, WB5 p. 87): roll twice on Step One to determine two disproportionate body areas, then roll on each appropriate sub-table.

entries.name: Short Legs
entries.description: Short, stubby legs like those of a go- rilla; +1 to P.S., +5% to sense of balance, and +1 to Horror Fac- tor. Penalties: Reduce Spd attribute by 10% and kick attacks do half damage.

entries.name: Small Feet
entries.description: +1 on initiative, +1 to P.P. Penalties: -10% to sense of balance and -10% to Climbing skill. Disproportionate Torso

entries.name: Small Hands
entries.description: Are small and delicate, like those of a small child; +1 to P.P., +5% to all manual dexterity related skills (Forgery, Palming, Pick Locks, Sewing, etc.) and +10% to Escape Artist skill. Penalties: -2 to damage from punches and claw attacks, -2 to entangle and disarm, -5% to Disguise and Undercover Ops skills, and hands always look odd and disturb- ing. Disproportionate Legs & Feet

entries.name: Small, Narrow Shoulders
entries.description: Can fit through small, narrow spaces, +5% to Escape Artist skill. Penalties: -5% to Disguise skill and makes even tight clothing seem loose, baggy, and frumpy; needs custom clothing and padded shoulders to look normal and well dressed.

entries.name: Thin and Tall/Long
entries.description: The upper body is narrow and long waisted, not spindly or puny, but tall and narrow like a board; increase height 2D4 inches (5-20 cm); +1 to dodge and entangle, +1 to Horror Factor. Penalty: Reduce Spd by 10% and -10% to Disguise and Undercover Ops skills.

entries.name: Thin Forearms
entries.description: Spindly, pipe-cleaner arms. Can easily fit through small openings and narrow spaces, +2% to Es- cape Artist skill. Penalties: -1D4 to P.S. and may look weak and vulnerable. Clothing looks baggy in the arms and even nor- mal hands may look oversized and disproportionate.

entries.name: Tiny Ears
entries.description: +1 to Perception Rolls dealing with sound.

entries.name: Tiny Eyes
entries.description: Perfect 20/20 vision, but poor peripheral vision (only 90 degrees), +1 to Horror Factor and Perception Rolls. Penalties: -1 to P.B. attribute, -1 to parry and dodge, and is not likely to see anyone sneaking up on him from behind or the side (opponents are +2 to strike with surprise attacks from behind)!

entries.name: Tiny Mouth
entries.description: The mouth is unusually small, practi- cally a slit with no lips, and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalty: -1 from M.A.

entries.name: Tiny Nose
entries.description: +1 to P.B., +2 to save vs gas attacks (in- cluding smoke, tear gas, stench, and other strong odors) and +4 to save vs nausea and vomiting resulting from foul odors and airborne toxins. Penalties: This little button nose has only a fair sense of smell: -10% to identify odors and cannot track by scent and -3 to Perception Rolls dealing with scents and odors. Disproportionate Arms & Hands

entries.name: Tiny Teeth
entries.description: The teeth look like those of a young human child or even smaller, and if the ‘Bane has fangs they are tiny too. The character may have twice as many teeth because they are so small. Penalties: -1 from Horror Factor and any damage from bite attacks is half the normal amount.

entries.name: Torso
entries.description: Step One (Disproportion Table, WB5 p. 87): the disproportionate body area is the torso. Roll on Disproportionate Torso (p. 88).

entries.name: Unusually Long Arms
entries.description: The character has long up- per and lower arms reminiscent to a gorilla or ape. The character looks out of proportion, but has an extended reach (20% longer than usual), +1 to parry and entangle. Penalties: -1 to P.B., -20% to Disguise and Undercover Ops skills and requires cus- tom clothing, otherwise shirts, jackets, etc., look too short/small in the arms.

entries.name: Very Small Head
entries.description: The head is a small, low-profile target to hit; attackers must make a Called Shot to target it and still suffer a penalty of -3 to strike, +2 to Horror Factor. Pen- alties: -1 to I.Q. and P.B. attributes.
